name: wiki-companion-for-openproject
description: Firefox-first WebExtension to improve OpenProject wiki navigation behavior.

scripts.stash:local: mkdir -p .local && for d in dist test-results .playwright playwright-report coverage; do if [ -e "$d" ]; then mv "$d" .local/$d; fi; done
scripts.build:firefox: npm run clean && npm run build:assets && npm run build:manifest:firefox
scripts.build:chromium: npm run clean && npm run build:assets && npm run build:manifest:chromium
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-extension.mjs --target firefox
